name: Apply multi-hunk diff to add error handling and logging
description: Use applyDiff with multiple hunks to add try/catch error handling and logging to a service file
task: Read /project/src/service.ts and apply a diff to add error handling with try/catch around the database calls, and add logging before each operation.

turns.text: Applied 3 hunks: added logger import, wrapped getUser and createUser in try/catch with logging.
